import_story.title: Live Memory Gate Check
import_story.description: Plan 07 retro validation with real memory extraction and real scene summary.

steps.eval: for (const key of Object.keys(globalThis).filter((k) => k.startsWith('storyOrchestratorDebug'))) delete globalThis[key]; globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.setExtractionSettings({ enabled: true, profileId: 'afcc7073-3510-4f67-8070-35ce449d4792', cadence: 2 }); return true;

steps.send_generate: We step into the moonlit hall. I tell Arin that the brass statue by the stairs is the one from my dream.
I ask Arin to guard the statue while I copy the inscription on its base into my journal.

steps.eval: const audit = { id: 'retro-scene', createdAt: new Date().toISOString(), priority: 0, reason: 'scene:location', contractHash: 'h', scope: [], window: { from: 0, to: 3 }, prompt: 'p', rawResponse: 'r', acceptedDeltas: [], rejected: [], sceneBreak: { at: 3, reason: 'location' } }; await globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.runSceneBreakPass(audit); const memory = globalThis.storyOrchestratorRuntime.getSnapshot().memory; const scenes = memory.entries.filter((entry) => entry.tier === 'scene_history'); if (!scenes.length || !scenes[0].text || scenes[0].text.length < 10) throw new Error('expected real scene summary, got ' + JSON.stringify(scenes)); return scenes[0].text;

const chat = SillyTavern.getContext().chat; const found = chat.some((m) => typeof m.mes === 'string' && m.mes.includes('The scene shifts.')); if (!found) throw new Error('expected sceneBreak scripted reply'); return true;
